expectations.text: Identifies that tasks T001-T006 are already marked complete
expectations.evidence: The response says `Already completed and skipped: T001-T006 (6 tasks)`.

expectations.text: Reports a count or summary of completed vs remaining tasks
expectations.evidence: It gives both counts and status: `6 tasks` completed and `Remaining tasks: 9`.

expectations.text: Does not re-execute already completed tasks
expectations.evidence: It says `Do not re-run or re-mark T001-T006 during normal resumption.`

expectations.text: Begins execution from the first incomplete task in the current phase
expectations.evidence: The `Resume point` says `Start at the first unchecked task in the Tests phase (T007).`

claims.claim: Six tasks are already complete and skipped.
claims.evidence: The resumption summary explicitly says `T001-T006 (6 tasks)`.

claims.claim: Execution resumes at `T007` rather than replaying completed setup work.
claims.evidence: The `Resume point` section states that start point directly.
